## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure

## Checklist

- [ ] All tests pass (`npm test` in affected service directories)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or credentials in code
- [ ] OpenAPI spec updated if endpoints were added/modified (`docs/api/specs/`)
- [ ] K8s manifests updated if new services added (`infrastructure/k8s/`)
- [ ] Integration tests updated if pipeline behavior changed (`tests/integration/`)
- [ ] Documentation drift review completed (`docs/testing/docs-drift-checklist.md`)
- [ ] `docs/TECHNICAL.md` updated if runtime or architecture behavior changed
- [ ] `docs/USER-GUIDE.md` updated if UI or workflow behavior changed
- [ ] `docs/testing/*` updated if scenarios, gates, UAT, or evidence expectations changed
- [ ] `docs/stateful-fraud-*.md` updated if stateful fraud scope, roadmap, or closure status changed
